technology.title: Chinese scientists create ‘kill-them-all’ algorithm for drone warfare
technology.summary: A research team from northwestern China has released a new algorithm that could fundamentally change how drone swarms hunt and destroy enemy targets. The algorithm, known as HG-STR (Heterogeneous Graph Spatio-Temporal Reasoning), promises to allow a fleet of fixed-wing drones to autonomously search a vast battlefield and eliminate every single enemy, even when their communications are being jammed and their vision is blocked. It is the first known algorithm capable of achieving a 100 per cent...

briefing.news_focus: A research team from northwestern China has released a new algorithm that could fundamentally change how drone swarms hunt and destroy enemy targets. The algorithm, known as HG-STR (Heterogeneous Graph Spatio-Temporal Reasoning), promises to allow a fleet of fixed-wing drones to autonomously search a vast battlefield and eliminate every single enemy, even when their communications are being jammed and their vision is blocked. It is the first known algorithm capable of achieving a 100 per cent...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國西北部的研究團隊開發了一種名為HG-STR（異質圖空間時間推理）的新算法，該算法可能徹底改變無人機群在戰場上的作戰方式。這種算法能夠使一群固定翼無人機自主搜索廣闊的戰場，並在通訊被干擾和視線受阻的情況下，消滅所有敵方目標。這是首個能夠實現100%消滅敵人的算法。
briefing.background: 隨著無人機技術的迅速發展，各國軍事力量越來越依賴無人機進行戰鬥和偵察。無人機群的使用具有成本效益高、靈活性強的優勢，並且能在複雜環境中執行任務。中國在無人機技術方面的投資持續增加，尤其是在人工智能和自動化領域。HG-STR算法的推出，顯示出中國在軍事科技上追求自主創新和技術領先的決心，並可能改變未來戰爭的格局。
briefing.analysis: HG-STR算法的開發可能會引發國際間對無人機戰爭倫理和安全的廣泛討論。此技術的出現，對於中國軍事現代化進程具有重要意義，可能使其在地區衝突中獲得戰略優勢。然而，這也可能引發其他國家的擔憂，特別是對於無人機技術的軍事化應用及其對平民安全的潛在威脅。各國可能會加強對無人機技術的監管，並尋求發展相應的反制措施。此外，這項技術的擴散可能會改變全球軍備競賽的動態，促使其他國家加速研發類似技術以維持軍事平衡。

technology.title: Anthropic raises further US$65bn to eclipse OpenAI in market valuation

briefing.news_focus: Anthropic raises further US$65bn to eclipse OpenAI in market valuation
briefing.news_focus_zh: Anthropic公司成功籌集了650億美元的資金，將其估值提升至9650億美元，成為全球最有價值的人工智慧公司，超越了競爭對手OpenAI。這一籌資行動顯示出人工智慧產業仍然吸引著大量資金流入，並標誌著Anthropic在全球人工智慧競賽中的顯著成長。
briefing.background: 近年來，人工智慧技術迅速發展，吸引了大量投資者的關注。Anthropic成立於2020年，專注於開發安全且可控的AI系統，並推出了Claude聊天機器人。隨著企業對AI應用的需求增加，Anthropic的產品逐漸被大型企業廣泛採用，特別是其強大的編程助手功能，這使得其市場地位迅速上升。這一背景下，Anthropic的最新融資顯示出市場對其未來增長潛力的信心。
briefing.analysis: Anthropic的成功籌資不僅提升了其市場估值，還顯示出AI領域的競爭日益激烈。與OpenAI相比，Anthropic的產品在企業市場的接受度顯著提高，這可能促使OpenAI加快其產品開發和市場擴張策略。根據參考報導，Anthropic的崛起使其成為市場的主導者，這可能會改變未來的競爭格局。各方利益關係中，投資者希望從中獲得高回報，而企業則尋求利用AI技術提升效率和創新能力。未來，隨著市場競爭的加劇，可能會出現更多的併購或合作機會，進一步重塑AI產業的生態系統。

supporting_titles: Anthropic reaches valuation of $965bn, beating OpenAI to become world’s most valuable AI firm
supporting_summaries: Claude’s parent company’s $65bn in latest funding round underscores vast sums of money still flowing into industry Anthropic, the AI firm behind the Claude chatbot, announced on Thursday it had raised $65bn in funding to value the company at $965bn post-money. The move makes Anthropic the world’s most valuable AI startup, eclipsing its competitor OpenAI. The deal marks an exceedingly successful period of growth for Anthropic, which was once considered to be a smaller player in the global AI arms race. The widespread adoption of its products by large enterprise businesses, especially following its release of powerful coding assistants late last year, has turned it into a dominant player in the industry. Continue reading...

technology.title: Why I’m grateful to the Pope for his encyclical on AI | Francine Prose
technology.summary: The intelligent and thoughtful encyclical is an important warning of the uses and misuses of a rapidly developing technology. Silicon Valley is wrong to dismiss it Often I’m asked if I think that the novels of the future will all be written by AI. It’s not so much a question as a provocation. Do I worry that a machine can do what I do, only better? I usually say something like: “No algorithm is going to write Anna Karenina!” which is also not a real answer. So I’m grateful to Pope Leo XIV, the American pope, for his recently issued letter to the world, Magnifica Humanitas: On Safeguarding the Human Person in the Time of Artificial Intelligence. It’s a long (more than 40,00 words), intelligent and thoughtful encyclical in which the pope addresses the uses and misuses of a rapidly developing technology. Now when someone asks my opinion of AI, I can refer them to the pope’s letter, or at least chapter three. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: The intelligent and thoughtful encyclical is an important warning of the uses and misuses of a rapidly developing technology. Silicon Valley is wrong to dismiss it Often I’m asked if I think that the novels of the future will all be written by AI. It’s not so much a question as a provocation. Do I worry that a machine can do what I do, only better? I usually say something like: “No algorithm is going to write Anna Karenina!” which is also not a real answer. So I’m grateful to Pope Leo XIV, the American pope, for his recently issued letter to the world, Magnifica Humanitas: On Safeguarding the Human Person in the Time of Artificial Intelligence. It’s a long (more than 40,00 words), intelligent and thoughtful encyclical in which the pope addresses the uses and misuses of a rapidly developing technology. Now when someone asks my opinion of AI, I can refer them to the pope’s letter, or at least chapter three. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 法蘭辛·普羅斯在《衛報商業版》上表達了對教宗利奧十四世最近發布的通諭《Magnifica Humanitas》的感激之情。該通諭深入探討了人工智慧的使用與濫用，並警告社會對於這項快速發展技術的潛在風險。普羅斯認為，矽谷對於教宗的警示態度過於輕視，並表示這封超過四萬字的通諭為她在討論人工智慧時提供了有力的參考。
briefing.background: 教宗利奧十四世的通諭《Magnifica Humanitas》是在全球對人工智慧技術日益關注的背景下發布的。隨著AI技術的迅速發展，許多專家與學者對其在創作、倫理與社會影響等方面的潛在風險表示擔憂。這封通諭不僅反映了宗教界對科技進步的關注，也試圖引導社會在享受科技便利的同時，保持對人性的尊重與保護。普羅斯的觀點強調了文學創作與人類情感之間的獨特性，並質疑AI是否能真正取代人類的創造力。
briefing.analysis: 普羅斯的觀點突顯了科技與人文之間的緊張關係，尤其是在AI技術的發展上。她對教宗通諭的讚賞，反映出對於科技可能帶來的倫理困境的深刻思考。矽谷的反應則可能顯示出對於這種警告的輕視，認為AI的發展是不可阻擋的進步。然而，這種態度可能會忽視社會對於AI技術的擔憂，特別是在創作與人類價值的交匯點上。未來，隨著AI技術的進一步發展，如何平衡技術創新與人類價值將成為重要的議題，可能會引發更廣泛的社會討論與政策反思。

politics.title: US not 'turning back' on Asia allies, but expects them to boost defence - Hegseth
politics.summary: The US defense secretary is questioned about US commitment, including further arms deals, at an Asian security summit in Singapore.

briefing.news_focus: The US defense secretary is questioned about US commitment, including further arms deals, at an Asian security summit in Singapore.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 在新加坡舉行的亞洲安全峰會上，美國國防部長彼得·赫格斯特（Pete Hegseth）強調美國不會對其在亞洲的盟友撤回承諾，但同時期望這些國家能提升國防開支。赫格斯特的發言是在面對外界對美國在亞洲地區承諾的質疑時作出的，並且他提到進一步的軍售計畫。
briefing.background: 美國在亞洲的軍事存在與盟友關係一直是地緣政治的重要議題。隨著中國在軍事上的快速擴張，美國對其盟友的支持變得更加重要。赫格斯特的發言反映出美國對於中國軍事增長的擔憂，並呼籲盟友加強防務支出，以應對潛在的威脅。這一背景下，亞洲國家面臨著如何平衡與美國的軍事合作與自身國防需求的挑戰。
briefing.analysis: 赫格斯特的強調顯示出美國對於亞洲盟友的期待，尤其是在面對中國軍事擴張的情況下。參考報導指出，赫格斯特對中國的軍事增長表達了嚴重的擔憂，這使得美國希望盟友能夠在防務上做出更多的投入。這一立場可能會引發亞洲國家之間的不同反應，部分國家可能會加強軍事合作，而另一些則可能會因為擔心軍備競賽而保持謹慎。此外，這也可能影響到美國與盟友之間的軍售協議，未來的軍售計畫可能會受到更大關注。

supporting_titles: Pentagon chief sounds ‘alarm’ over China’s buildup, urges allies to boost defence spend
supporting_summaries: There is rightful alarm regarding China’s historic military buildup and the expansion of its military activities in the region and beyond, says U.S. Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth

politics.title: Friday briefing: ​What do the cuts in aid mean for the fight against Ebola in the DRC?
politics.summary: In today’s newsletter: As the virus spreads across borders, health workers warn that weakened global support is making a prolonged crisis more likely Ebola is spreading rapidly in parts of east Africa. The deadly disease, which kills around half of those it infects, is suspected to have claimed the lives of at least 240 people since the outbreak began in Ituri province in the Democratic Republic of the Congo earlier this month. Public health officials are scrambling to contain the virus in one of the toughest environments: Ituri province, the centre of the crisis , is a mining hub where thousands of people work in close proximity every day, and a conflict zone, with ongoing fighting between rebel groups. Medical facilities are modest, while waves of displaced people are being forced into overcrowded camps to escape fighting , making it even harder to control transmission. The virus has already spread to other regions in eastern DRC and the Ugandan capital Kampala. UK news | Britain risks a financial hit worth £125bn a year after a rise in the number of young people not in employment or education to more than 1 million. US-Israel-Iran | Donald Trump has circulated a draft peace agreement for the war with Iran among allies including Israel as both sides try to prevent fresh breaches of the ceasefire escalating out of control. UK politics | Andy Burnham has rolled back from his previous calls for ministers to scrap a restriction on immigrants claiming benefits as the Makerfield byelection places greater scrutiny on him. Ukraine | A Russian drone that was part of an overnight attack on Ukraine crashed into an apartment building in eastern Romania , injuring two people, authorities said, in what an official statement condemned as an “irresponsible escalation” by Moscow. Climate crisis | Abandoning net zero and drilling for more oil and gas would be a massive setback for the UK and would not help the economy, leading experts have said in response to Tony Blair. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus_zh: 剛果民主共和國東部的伊圖里省爆發埃博拉疫情，已造成至少240人死亡。隨著病毒擴散，公共衛生官員警告全球援助減少可能導致危機持續惡化。該地區不僅是礦業中心，還是衝突區，醫療設施有限，難民湧入擁擠的避難所，使得疫情控制更加困難。隨著疫情蔓延至其他地區及烏干達首都坎帕拉，當地衛生工作者面臨更大的挑戰。
briefing.background: 埃博拉病毒在剛果民主共和國的爆發歷史悠久，特別是在東部地區，這裡的衝突和人道危機使得公共衛生工作面臨巨大挑戰。伊圖里省的礦業活動使得人員密集，增加了病毒傳播的風險。隨著全球對該地區的援助減少，尤其是在疫情爆發的初期，醫療資源的短缺使得控制疫情變得更加困難。此時，國際社會的支持對於防止疫情擴散至其他國家至關重要。
briefing.analysis: 此次報導強調了全球援助減少對剛果民主共和國埃博拉疫情的影響，特別是在疫情爆發初期的脆弱環境中，這一點在先前的報導中未被充分強調。公共衛生官員的警告顯示，若不加強國際支持，疫情可能會進一步惡化，導致更多人死亡。各方利益關係中，當地政府希望獲得更多國際援助以應對疫情，而國際社會則可能因資源分配問題而面臨困難。未來幾周，疫情的發展將取決於國際社會的反應及當地政府的應對能力。

supporting_titles: Russian drone launched against Ukraine crashes in Romania, injuring two
Japan’s Frigate Diplomacy — and What It Could Mean for Taiwan
supporting_summaries: The drone was tracked by radar in Romanian airspace and crashed onto the roof of a building in Galati
Can Japan become a second major democratic partner for Taiwan’s defense industry?

politics.title: U.S. War Secretary Hegseth backs Trump’s India-Pak ceasefire claim; outlines Indo-Pacific strategy
politics.summary: The U.S. Secretary of War Pete Hegseth said both India and Pakistan would continue to view each other through the prism of security concerns

briefing.news_focus: The U.S. Secretary of War Pete Hegseth said both India and Pakistan would continue to view each other through the prism of security concerns
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國國防部長皮特·赫格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）支持特朗普對印度與巴基斯坦停火聲明的看法，並指出兩國在安全問題上仍會持續相互關注。他強調，這種安全觀點將影響兩國的雙邊關係及地區穩定。
briefing.background: 印度與巴基斯坦之間的緊張關係由來已久，兩國因克什米爾地區的主權爭議而多次衝突。美國在此背景下，試圖促進兩國之間的對話與和平進程。特朗普政府曾多次表達希望兩國能夠達成持久和平的意願，並在此過程中，美國的角色被視為關鍵。赫格塞斯的發言反映了美國對於印巴關係的持續關注，並且強調安全問題在兩國外交中的重要性。
briefing.analysis: 赫格塞斯的支持表明美國對於印度與巴基斯坦之間的和平進程持積極態度，然而，兩國之間的安全疑慮仍然是主要障礙。印度與巴基斯坦的歷史對立使得雙方在任何和平談判中都難以完全信任對方。美國的介入可能會影響雙方的談判動態，但也可能引發兩國對美國立場的懷疑，尤其是在印巴雙方各自的國內政治環境中。此外，赫格塞斯提到的印太戰略，顯示出美國在該地區的軍事與外交布局，可能會進一步影響印巴關係的發展。

economy.title: Unicorn born in record time amid ‘arms race’ among China’s robotic hand developers
economy.summary: Venture capitalists and industrial giants in China are aggressively backing developers of dexterous robotic hands – the toughest bottleneck in the global humanoid hardware arms race – in a funding blitz that is rapidly driving up start-up valuations. The latest capital injection was announced on Friday by Xynova. The Hangzhou-based start-up said it had completed a series A round from investors including the venture arms of smartphone maker Xiaomi and electric vehicle giant Li Auto, bringing...

briefing.news_focus: Venture capitalists and industrial giants in China are aggressively backing developers of dexterous robotic hands – the toughest bottleneck in the global humanoid hardware arms race – in a funding blitz that is rapidly driving up start-up valuations. The latest capital injection was announced on Friday by Xynova. The Hangzhou-based start-up said it had completed a series A round from investors including the venture arms of smartphone maker Xiaomi and electric vehicle giant Li Auto, bringing...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國的機器人手開發者正面臨激烈的資金競爭，許多風險投資者和工業巨頭積極支持這一領域的初創公司。最新的資金注入來自於位於杭州的初創公司Xynova，該公司完成了A輪融資，投資者包括智能手機製造商小米和電動車巨頭理想汽車的風險投資部門。這一資金潮流迅速提升了初創公司的估值，顯示出市場對靈巧機器人手的需求迫切。
briefing.background: 靈巧機器人手被視為全球人形硬體競賽中的關鍵瓶頸，因其在模擬人類手部動作方面的挑戰性。隨著人工智慧和自動化技術的迅速發展，越來越多的企業和投資者將目光投向這一領域。中國的科技公司在這場競賽中扮演了重要角色，尤其是在政府支持和資金充足的背景下，促使相關初創公司迅速成長。這種資金的激增不僅反映了市場對技術創新的渴望，也顯示出在全球市場中，中國企業希望佔據領先地位的決心。
briefing.analysis: 在這場資金競賽中，主要利益相關者包括風險投資者、工業巨頭和初創公司。風險投資者如小米和理想汽車的參與，顯示出他們對機器人技術未來潛力的信心，並希望通過投資獲得高回報。初創公司則因資金的湧入而迅速提升估值，這可能會吸引更多的投資者進一步參與。然而，這種資金競爭也可能導致市場泡沫的風險，特別是在技術尚未成熟的情況下。隨著競爭的加劇，未來可能會出現技術整合或併購的情況，以便企業能夠快速獲得所需的技術能力。

economy.title: Bank of England’s Bailey says no rush to raise interest rates amid Iran war uncertainty
economy.summary: Inflation can be tolerated above 2% target for now ‘given context of softness in real economy’, governor says The Bank of England is in no rush to raise interest rates while the outcome of the Iran war remains uncertain and the UK’s growth rate stays weak, its governor, Andrew Bailey, has said. In a signal that borrowing costs will remain at 3.75% at least during the summer, Bailey said it was tolerable for inflation to stay above the Bank’s 2% target during the current crisis. However, that would change if a more permanent increase in prices began to take effect, he said. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Inflation can be tolerated above 2% target for now ‘given context of softness in real economy’, governor says The Bank of England is in no rush to raise interest rates while the outcome of the Iran war remains uncertain and the UK’s growth rate stays weak, its governor, Andrew Bailey, has said. In a signal that borrowing costs will remain at 3.75% at least during the summer, Bailey said it was tolerable for inflation to stay above the Bank’s 2% target during the current crisis. However, that would change if a more permanent increase in prices began to take effect, he said. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英格蘭銀行行長安德魯·貝利表示，因應伊朗戰爭的不確定性及英國經濟增長疲軟，銀行不急於提高利率。貝利指出，儘管通脹率超過2%的目標，但在當前危機背景下，這是可以接受的。他預計利率將至少保持在3.75%至夏季，並強調如果價格持續上漲，則將重新評估這一立場。
briefing.background: 英國目前面臨經濟增長放緩的挑戰，通脹率持續高於央行的目標水平。隨著全球局勢的變化，特別是中東地區的衝突，能源價格波動對英國經濟的影響日益顯著。英格蘭銀行的貨幣政策在此背景下需要謹慎考量，特別是在利率和通脹之間的平衡。貝利的言論反映了央行在不確定環境中對經濟增長的重視，並試圖避免過快的貨幣緊縮。
briefing.analysis: 貝利的表態顯示出英格蘭銀行在面對通脹壓力與經濟增長放緩之間的微妙平衡。市場對於利率政策的預期將受到伊朗戰爭及其對全球能源市場影響的驅動。參考報導指出，隨著可再生能源的興起，這場戰爭可能會進一步提升其吸引力，這可能會影響英國的能源政策及經濟結構轉型。各方利益關係中，政府希望穩定經濟增長，企業則關注借貸成本，而消費者則希望通脹不再惡化。未來，若通脹持續上升，英格蘭銀行可能不得不重新考慮其利率策略。

economy.title: Gluten-free basics ‘now a luxury’ as price of a small branded loaf nears £4
economy.summary: People with coeliac disease say inflation and shrinking ranges are making food staples unaffordable Gluten-free versions of everyday staples such as bread and biscuits are becoming a luxury, with shoppers complaining that a “decent” small loaf now costs nearly £4. Consumers have always paid a premium for these specialist foods, making any price increases a source of concern, particularly for people who follow a gluten-free diet for medical reasons. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: People with coeliac disease say inflation and shrinking ranges are making food staples unaffordable Gluten-free versions of everyday staples such as bread and biscuits are becoming a luxury, with shoppers complaining that a “decent” small loaf now costs nearly £4. Consumers have always paid a premium for these specialist foods, making any price increases a source of concern, particularly for people who follow a gluten-free diet for medical reasons. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 隨著通貨膨脹的影響，無麩質食品的價格飆升，特別是小型品牌的無麩質麵包價格接近4英鎊，讓許多患有乳糜瀉的人感到困擾。這些消費者表示，無麩質食品的選擇越來越少，這使得本就昂貴的基本食品變得更加無法負擔，尤其是對於因醫療原因需要遵循無麩質飲食的人來說，價格上漲引發了更大的擔憂。
briefing.background: 無麩質飲食對於乳糜瀉患者來說是必需的，這種疾病使得患者無法消化麩質。過去，無麩質食品的價格通常高於普通食品，因為生產這些食品需要特殊的原料和加工過程。近期的通貨膨脹導致食品價格普遍上漲，無麩質食品的價格上漲尤其明顯，這讓依賴這類食品的消費者面臨更大的經濟壓力。隨著市場上無麩質產品的選擇逐漸減少，消費者的選擇空間也受到限制，進一步加劇了這一問題。
briefing.analysis: 無麩質食品的價格上漲反映了更廣泛的經濟挑戰，特別是對於依賴這些產品的特定消費群體。對於乳糜瀉患者來說，這不僅是價格問題，更是健康問題。隨著價格的上升，許多消費者可能被迫尋找替代品，這可能會影響他們的健康狀況。此外，市場上無麩質產品的供應減少，可能會導致競爭減少，進一步推高價格。各大品牌和零售商在此情況下的反應將成為未來市場走向的關鍵，若無法有效應對價格上漲，可能會引發消費者的不滿和市場信任的下降。
